textByHash.40a5aea7f53328f83f15820df0eec58d5db16d7a: Humans... You stand before Amoxliatl. State your intent.
textByHash.64de72018eaf3da73f42e18f059ba8c77ae79a2a: After them? No. You will not be going anywhere...
textByHash.74b3b8df7795baf69ce5394d483308aa1e99d545: A greeting is not a statement of intent. State your intent.
textByHash.798196c21edbb10673efc1731fc035b80613afc8: Euat! This is not yet over!
textByHash.79f4a3be4f31451952e718b3dcf9cf504c8131ae: Human arrogance. Here in Tapoyauik, I decide who is worthy.
textByHash.861fdd3adf60bb7774b12b1ea822d428f08055c9: Euat! I am not so easily destroyed!
textByHash.98f109c8dfb286536a12134187d190ead0ebd075: Euat! You are not welcome here!
textByHash.b6ec828a3aeea13b2e1a76bca736044a23a55ccd: Euat! We are not done yet!
textByHash.ba1665984af050098d8f7c4cd5fd9808fd7b953e: You? You are nothing. You defile this place. Now face the consequences.
textByHash.e3fae817c5e45c5c5fc865d3d73b1a6277dffb50: Mokhaiotl? The Tlati archive? That place is not for your kind. You misused the gifts you were granted. You are unworthy.
textByHash.f3478788d82feb3af208eae7ba26f8b68095dbb9: Your statement lacks specificity. Clarify. What information?
